title: Totem of Undying Ichigo
description: This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom pixel-art design of Ichigo Kurosaki.
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4379c3bf2e17dd291dbf37d6ce0c22c68da33366.png)

# 🟠 Bleach Totem – Ichigo Kurosaki

Bring the spirit of a Soul Reaper into your Minecraft survival world.
This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom pixel-art design of **Ichigo Kurosaki**, capturing his calm determination and Shinigami presence. Every revival feels powerful, focused, and anime-inspired.

### ✨ Features
- ✔️ Custom Totem of Undying texture – Ichigo Kurosaki
- ✔️ Clean pixel-art style inspired by Bleach
- ✔️ Vanilla-friendly (no OptiFine required)
- ✔️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.8 → 1.21+
- ✔️ Lightweight, multiplayer-safe resource pack

### 📥 Installation

1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in-game via Options → Resource Packs

### 📌 Notes

This is a fan-made project inspired by *Bleach*.

All rights belong to the original creators.
